reviews.comment:
Un desastre, mala atención.nunca tienen nada para comer y frío ni hablar¡¡Malisimo

(Translated by Google)
A disaster, bad service. They never have anything to eat and it's not cold, let's not even talk about it. Terrible.

reviews.comment:
Buena opción para un descanzo en el viaje y reponer fuerzas con algo de comida...si mal no recuerdo venden pizzas ...

(Translated by Google)
A good option for a break during your trip and to recharge with some food...if I remember correctly they sell pizzas...

reviews.comment:
No aceptaban VISA. Después que pagué las medialunas, me dieron unas todas quemadas (ver foto).  Cuando le pido para cambiarlas, estaban TODAS quemadas.  No sé como pueden poner a la venta algo así. No es un buen lugar para parar salvo que estés muy necesitado. Me pareció todo excesivamente caro.

(Translated by Google)
They didn't accept VISA. After I paid for the croissants, they gave me some that were completely burnt (see photo). When I asked to exchange them, they were ALL burnt. I don't know how they can sell something like that. It's not a good place to stop unless you're really in need. I found everything excessively expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3OUlTVER3EAE

reviews.comment:
